rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]><Ruby={2:4}たい>大した <Ruby={4:6}まもの>魔物じゃなかったかもしれんが
オレを<Ruby={2:4}たす>助けようという その<Ruby={4:4}きも>気持ちが<Ruby={2:4}うれ>嬉しいね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>That didn't seem like much of a threat,
but it's still good to know you're looking
out for me.<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Thanks! More monsters turning up here
is getting to be a real pain.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>帮大忙了！<unk[5:0]>虽说这敌人不算什么，
但掉以轻心也是会吃苦头的！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>得救了！<unk[5:0]>雖然對手不怎麼樣，
不過輕敵可是會害了自己啊！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]><Ruby={2:4}たす>助かったぜ！<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}たい>大した<Ruby={4:6}あいて>相手じゃなかったとはいえ
<Ruby={4:6}ゆだん>油断したら<Ruby={4:8}あしもと>足元をすくわれるからな！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>You helped me out!<unk[5:0]> Wasn't the worst
scrap I've seen, but I could've been hurt
if I wasn't on guard.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]><Ruby={4:6}みごと>見事だったぜ！<unk[5:0]>
おまえにとっちゃ <Ruby={4:10}らくしょう>楽勝だったってことか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>Well, look at that!<unk[5:0]> I bet that was a piece
of cake for you, right?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>你的身手真不错啊！<unk[5:1]>
要不要来当我的护卫……？<unk[5:1]>开个玩笑而已！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>なかなかの<Ruby={4:8}うでまえ>腕前じゃねぇか！<unk[5:1]>
オレの<Ruby={4:6}ごえい>護衛にならないか…？<unk[5:1]> なんつってな！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>Pretty good!<unk[5:1]> Want to be my bodyguard?<unk[5:1]>
Ha, just kidding!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>刚才可真是不妙……<unk[5:1]>
还好你来了才能得救！谢谢啊！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]><Ruby={2:4}いま>今のは さすがにヤバかったな…<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:2}き>来てくれて<Ruby={2:4}たす>助かったぜ！ ありがとうよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>Pretty darn close...<unk[5:1]> Good thing you
happened by. Thanks!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>总算是得救了……<unk[5:1]>
我都意识模糊，以为快要不行了……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>なんとか <Ruby={2:4}たす>助かった…<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:2}き>気が<Ruby={2:4}とお>遠くなって もうダメかと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思った…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>You saved me...somehow.<unk[5:1]> When I got
knocked out, I thought I was a goner.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>ふ～… ヤバい ヤバい<unk[5:0]>
ついつい<Ruby={4:6}ゆだん>油断しちまったか…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>Yeesh. That was ugly.<unk[5:0]> I just totally let
my guard down there.

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>What a relief!<unk[5:0]> Can you do something
about this?

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:2}い>要らぬ お<Ruby={4:8}せっかい>節介だと<Ruby={2:2}い>言いたいところだが<unk[5:1]>
やせ<Ruby={4:6}がまん>我慢はやめだ！ <unk[5:0]><Ruby={2:4}たす>助かるぞ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 49]>I wish I could say I don't need the help...<unk[5:1]>
but I've got to swallow my pride here.<unk[5:0]>
Thank you!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>こいつの<Ruby={2:4}つよ>強さ <Ruby={4:10}じんじょう>尋常じゃないぞ！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:10}しょうめん>正面からぶつかったら…<unk[5:1]> やられる！！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>That thing's sheer power is nowhere
near normal!<unk[5:0]> No way to hit it head-on
without being plain destroyed!
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>A little reward for you... Here,<unk[5:0]> take this.

rows.TWzh: 這張臉印在我腦海裡了……
rows.JPja: この<Ruby={2:4}かお>顔 <Ruby={2:4}おぼ>覚えちゃったよ…
